name: fetcher records freshness_status fresh in its output when source was fetched within the window
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/last-fetch fixtures && printf '2026-05-13T00:00:00Z\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/last-fetch/cfpb.txt && printf '{"number":1,"merged":true}\n' > fixtures/prs.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/fetch.sh" --source cfpb --upstream-stub fixtures/prs.jsonl --now 2026-05-13T12:00:00Z --freshness-window 24h --force 2>out.txt && grep -q 'freshness_status=fresh' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
